title: Hiding and unhiding columns by searched keywords
excerpt:
In the “Display Columns” menu, we have the option to toggle a box for “All Columns” and for “Item Columns”. When an item is searched and Item Column box is selected, it still selects all columns. 
It could make sense for…

posts.author: CHOCM (Christopher Herndon)
posts.cookedHtml:
In the “Display Columns” menu, we have the option to toggle a box for “All Columns” and for “Item Columns”. When an item is searched and Item Column box is selected, it still selects all columns.

It could make sense for the Item Column and Subitem Column boxes to only select searched items when the search bar is being used.
